title: Make linked items exclusive
excerpt: I have created 2 boards for an event I’m hosting, one for people (attendee’s), and one for payments (tickets). I’ve linked them so that I can connect a person to a payment, the connection is two way and i’ve disabled lin…

posts.author: adammarsh (Adam Marsh)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created 2 boards for an event I’m hosting, one for people (attendee’s), and one for payments (tickets). I’ve linked them so that I can connect a person to a payment, the connection is two way and i’ve disabled linking to multiple items. But currently two people can be connected to one payment, and vice versa. Is there a way to prevent this so that once a linked item is selected, it can’t then be linked to another item?

I’ve read other discussions like this but the problem doesn’t seem to have been solved. Any help would be appreciated.

posts.author: Mindflows_Shanine (Shanine Velarde)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Adam!

Shanine here from Mindflows. Currently, it is not possible to prevent multiple connections between linked items in monday.com. Even if you disable linking to multiple items, two people can still be connected to one payment and vice versa.

If you’re worried about other members adding more connected items in the column, you can restrict the column editing.

Hope that helps!

Shanine | Solution Consultant and monday.com expert
www.mindflows.eu
